fields.label: POC boundary
fields.options: Officer Tender Configuration POC: guided setup only. No publication, bidder portal, evaluation, award, final PDF, or production BoQ.

fields.label: Contract Description
fields.description: Provide a concise description of the construction works, location, and expected output.

fields.label: Estimated Cost
fields.description: Enter the internal estimated cost used for configuration, thresholds, and validation. Public display may be controlled in production.

fields.label: Procuring Entity Address
fields.description: Enter the official physical or postal address to appear in the tender package.

fields.label: Procuring Entity Email
fields.description: Enter the official email address for clarification and tender correspondence.

fields.label: Procuring Entity Name
fields.description: Enter the official name of the procuring entity issuing the tender.

fields.label: Procuring Entity Reference
fields.description: Use a linked organization record where available. If not available, enter the procuring entity name and address fields manually.

fields.label: Works Location
fields.description: Enter the county, site, facility, or other location description for the works.

fields.label: Procurement Category
fields.options:
WORKS
GOODS
SERVICES
CONSULTING
DISPOSAL
OTHER

fields.label: Foreign Tenderer Local Input Rule Applicable
fields.description: Usually relevant for international tendering where foreign tenderer participation is expected.

fields.label: Joint Ventures Allowed
fields.description: Controls whether joint venture information forms are required from bidders.

fields.label: Margin of Preference Applicable
fields.description: Enable only where preference is legally applicable and disclosed in the tender.

fields.label: Maximum JV Members
fields.description: Required when joint ventures are allowed. Use a reasonable maximum consistent with the tender configuration.

fields.label: Prequalification Reference
fields.description: Required only when prequalification was used.

fields.label: Prequalification Used
fields.description: Enable if tendering is limited to prequalified tenderers under an earlier process.

fields.label: Reservation Applicable
fields.description: Enable only where the tender is legally reserved for an eligible group.

fields.label: Reserved Group
fields.description: Required only when reservation is enabled. The selected group will be rendered in the invitation and TDS summary.

fields.label: Clarification Deadline
fields.description: Enter the final date and time for clarification requests before submission.

fields.label: Opening Date and Time
fields.description: Enter the date and time for tender opening. For the POC, this should be the same as or after the submission deadline.

fields.label: Pre-Tender Meeting Date
fields.description: Required only when a pre-tender meeting is enabled.

fields.label: Pre-Tender Meeting Location
fields.description: Required only when a pre-tender meeting is enabled.

fields.label: Pre-Tender Meeting Required
fields.description: Enable if a pre-tender meeting is scheduled.

fields.label: Publication Date
fields.description: Enter the date the tender is intended to be published.

fields.label: Site Visit Date
fields.description: Required only when site visit is enabled.

fields.label: Site Visit Location
fields.description: Required only when site visit is enabled.

fields.label: Site Visit Required
fields.description: Enable if a site visit is part of the tender process.

fields.label: Submission Deadline
fields.description: Enter the final date and time for tender submission.

fields.label: Tender Validity Days
fields.description: Enter the tender validity period in calendar days.

fields.label: Advance Payment Security Required
fields.description: Controls whether the advance payment security form is included in the contract forms checklist.

fields.label: Performance Security Percentage
fields.description: Required when performance security is enabled.

fields.label: Performance Security Required
fields.description: Controls whether performance security contract forms are included in the contract forms checklist.

fields.label: Retention Money Security Required
fields.description: Controls whether the retention money security form is included in the contract forms checklist.

fields.label: Tender Security Amount
fields.description: Required when tender security mode is Tender Security. The amount should be validated against the configured estimated cost rule.

fields.label: Tender Security Currency
fields.description: Required when a tender security amount is required. KES is the default for this POC.

fields.label: Tender Security Mode
fields.description: Select whether bidders must provide a tender security, a tender-securing declaration, or no securing instrument for the POC scenario.

fields.label: Tender Security Type
fields.description: Required when tender security mode is Tender Security.

fields.label: Tender Security Additional Validity Days
fields.description: Required when tender security mode is Tender Security. The POC default is 30 days beyond tender validity.

fields.label: Alternative Scope Description
fields.description: Required when alternative technical solutions are allowed. Describe the permitted scope precisely.

fields.label: Alternative Tenders Allowed
fields.description: Enable only if alternative tenders are permitted for this procurement.

fields.label: Alternative Tender Type
fields.description: Required only when alternative tenders are allowed.

fields.label: Lot Award Method
fields.description: Required when multiple lots are enabled. Defines whether tenderers may win one or more lots or a package.

fields.label: Lot Evaluation Method
fields.description: Required when multiple lots are enabled.

fields.label: Multiple Lots Enabled
fields.description: Enable where tenderers may bid for one or more lots.

fields.label: Beneficial Ownership Disclosure Required
fields.description: Controls whether beneficial ownership disclosure is required in bidder and contract form checklists.

fields.label: Equipment Required
fields.description: Controls whether the equipment schedule form is required.

fields.label: Key Personnel Required
fields.description: Controls whether the personnel schedule form is required.

fields.label: Minimum Average Annual Turnover
fields.description: Enter the minimum average annual turnover threshold for qualification.

fields.label: Minimum Liquid Assets or Credit Line
fields.description: Enter the minimum liquidity or credit capacity required for contract execution.

fields.label: NCA Registration Required Before Award
fields.description: Indicates whether National Construction Authority registration is required before contract award or signature.

fields.label: Similar Contract Count
fields.description: Enter the number of similar contracts required for qualification.

fields.label: Similar Contract Minimum Value
fields.description: Enter the minimum value threshold for similar contract experience.

fields.label: Tax Compliance Required
fields.description: Controls whether tax compliance appears in the qualification summary and bidder response requirements.

fields.label: BoQ Required
fields.description: For this Works POC, BoQ is expected to be required and represented through structured child rows.

fields.label: Dayworks Included
fields.description: Controls whether sample daywork BoQ rows are generated in the POC.

fields.label: Drawings Required
fields.description: Controls whether the drawings section is shown as required in the tender-pack preview.

fields.label: ESHS Requirements
fields.description: Enter any ESHS requirements to be reflected in the tender-pack preview.

fields.label: Provisional Sums Included
fields.description: Controls whether sample provisional sum BoQ rows are generated in the POC.

fields.label: Scope Summary
fields.description: Provide a controlled summary of the works requirements.

fields.label: Specification Summary
fields.description: Provide a controlled high-level specification summary. Full detailed specification authoring is outside this POC.

fields.label: Advance Payment Allowed
fields.description: Controls whether advance payment appears in the contract/SCC summary. The related security field controls whether an advance payment securit

fields.label: Completion Period
fields.description: Enter the contract completion period for the works.

fields.label: Defects Liability Period
fields.description: Enter the defects liability period for the works contract.

fields.label: Dispute Resolution Forum
fields.description: Select the dispute resolution mechanism for the POC summary.

fields.label: Engineer or Project Manager
fields.description: Enter the office, role, or person responsible for contract administration in the POC summary.

fields.label: Insurance Requirements
fields.description: Enter the insurance requirements for the works contract.

fields.label: Liquidated Damages Rate
fields.description: Enter the liquidated damages rate in the required tender wording, for example percentage per week or fixed amount per day.

fields.label: Payment Terms
fields.description: Enter a controlled summary of payment terms for the POC.

fields.label: Retention Percentage
fields.description: Enter the retention percentage to be reflected in the SCC summary.

fields.label: Tender Status
fields.options:
Draft
Configured
Validation Failed
Validated
Tender Pack Generated
POC Demonstrated
Cancelled

fields.label: Validation Status
fields.options:
Not Validated
Passed
Passed With Warnings
Failed
Blocked

fields.label: Works Hardening Status
fields.options:
Not Checked
Pass
Warning
Blocked
Failed
Deferred

fields.label: Derived Models Status
fields.options:
Not Checked
Pass
Warning
Blocked
Failed
Deferred

fields.label: BoQ Hardening Status
fields.options:
Not Checked
Pass
Warning
Blocked
Failed
Deferred

fields.label: Works Requirements Status
fields.options:
Not Checked
Pass
Warning
Blocked
Failed
Deferred

fields.label: Attachments Status
fields.options:
Not Checked
Pass
Warning
Blocked
Failed
Deferred
